revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_constitution%2Fcore here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{#if:{{{url|}}}{{{website|}}}{{{archive-url|}}}{{{archive-date|}}}{{{via|}}}{{{access-date|}}} | {{cite web | url = {{{url|}}} | title = {{#if: {{{article|}}} | Article {{{article}}} | {{#if: {{{amendment|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{ordinal to word|{{{amendment}}}}}}} Amendment | {{error|Error: the {{code|article}} and {{code|amendment}} parameters cannot both be empty for the {{tl2|cite constitution}} template}} }} }}{{#if:{{{clause|}}} |, Clause {{{clause}}} }}{{#if:{{{section|}}} |, Section {{{section}}} }} | publisher = [[Constitution of {{#if: {{{polity|}}} | {{{polity}}} | {{error|Error: the {{code|polity}} parameter cannot be empty for the {{tl2|cite constitution}} template}} }}]]. {{#if:{{{website|}}}|{{{website}}}}} | date = {{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}} | {{error|Error: the {{code|date}} parameter cannot be empty for the {{tl2|cite constitution}} template}} }} | archive-url = {{{archive-url|}}} | archive-date = {{{archive-date|}}} | via = {{{via|}}} | access-date = {{{access-date|}}} }} | {{#if: {{{article|}}} | Article {{{article}}} | {{#if: {{{amendment|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{ordinal to word|{{{amendment}}}}}}} Amendment | {{error|Error: the {{code|article}} and {{code|amendment}} parameters cannot both be empty for the {{tl2|cite constitution}} template}} }} }}{{#if:{{{clause|}}}|, Clause {{{clause}}}}}{{#if:{{{section|}}}|, Section {{{section}}}}} of the [[Constitution of {{#if: {{{polity|}}} | {{{polity}}} | {{error|Error: the {{code|polity}} parameter cannot be empty for the {{tl2|cite constitution}} template}} }}]] ({{#if: {{{date|}}} | {{{date}}} | {{error|Error: the {{code|date}} parameter cannot be empty for the {{tl2|cite constitution}} template}} }}) }} {{documentation|content= This subtemplate is used by {{tl|cite constitution}} and should not be used directly! }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
